name: 日常捞图
description: 多规则循环筛选缺陷框，移除空行后限量采样
sql_template: SELECT d.*, r.product_type AS result_product_type FROM `product_detection_detail_result` d LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_no, MAX(product_type) AS product_type FROM product_detection_result GROUP BY product_no) r ON d.product_no = r.product_no WHERE d.c_time BETWEEN '${START_TIME}' AND '${END_TIME}' AND d.ext NOT LIKE '%"original_predictions": []%'

env_schema.label: 随机采样数量
env_schema.description: 规则筛选后随机取 N 条

env_schema.label: 随机种子
env_schema.description: 相同种子可复现采样结果

filter_rules_code:
def apply_filter_rules(df):
    # [loop1] loop(rules)
    _rules = [{'categories': ['脏污'], 'confidence_range': [0, 1], 'random_drop_ratio': 1.0}, {'categories': ['焊丝'], 'confidence_range': [0.1, 1], 'random_drop_ratio': 1.0}, {'categories': ['其他'], 'confidence_range': [0, 1], 'random_drop_ratio': 1.0}, {'categories': ['异色'], 'confidence_range': [0.2, 1], 'random_drop_ratio': 1.0}, {'categories': ['线头'], 'confidence_range': [0.1, 1], 'random_drop_ratio': 0.8}, {'categories': ['胶水'], 'confidence_range': [0, 1], 'random_drop_ratio': 0.8}, {'categories': ['胶水', '碰伤', '异物外漏', '凹坑', '鼓包', '划伤', '擦伤', '色差', '杂质', '褶皱（重度）', '破损', '压痕', '线头', '麻点'], 'confidence_range': [0, 0.2], 'random_drop_ratio': 1.0}]
    for _loop_rule in _rules:
        # [f1] filter
        df = filter_df_by_ext(df, categories=_loop_rule.get('categories', []), confidence_range=tuple(_loop_rule.get('confidence_range', [0, 1])), random_drop_ratio=_loop_rule.get('random_drop_ratio', 1.0))
        # [f2] remove_empty
        df = remove_empty_ext_rows(df)
    return df
python_code:
def process_data(df):
    view(count_category_boxes(df), "SQL输出类别统计")
    view(df, "SQL输出DataFrame")
    # [loop1] loop(rules)
    df = apply_filter_rules(df)
    view(df, "过滤之后的DataFrame")
    view(count_category_boxes(df), "过滤之后的类别统计")
    # [s1] 随机采样
    df = apply_random_sample_rows(df)
    view(df, "最终输出的DataFrame")
    view(count_category_boxes(df), "最终输出的类别统计")
    return df
